caption: A woman with long dark hair is captured in a series of frames during a video call. She is wearing a striped purple and white shirt and black over-the-ear headphones with a microphone. She is positioned in a room with a white wall behind her and a light-colored curtain to her left. A plain beige surface is visible to her right. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking, and her facial expressions and mouth movements shift as she talks. The text "Nancy Ramya" is displayed in the bottom left corner of each frame. The scene remains static in terms of location and equipment, with the only movement being the woman's natural facial expressions and speech as she engages in the conversation.
